image:image.image:title: Shared quests can strengthen academic teams
image:image.image:caption: Teams care about the topic, but the surrounding systems still produce activity without durable capability, better decisions, or visible business impact.

image:image.image:title: Mechanics fail when motivation design is weak
image:image.image:caption: Teams are treating gamification design as tooling rollout, but the real constraint is whether work systems, manager behavior, and capability-building routines actually change.
